title: NewMine
description: Fabric 1.21.1 | First server-side modpack on 1.21.1 with new structures and mechanics!
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c6fbedaf784f1eaef6b7d7cab42f8264449843a.png)

# Welcome
**Welcome to the modpack called NewMine, this is the first modpack made on version 1.21.1, that is, the game has the latest game mechanics.**

## **Goal**

There is no goal in this modpack, all you need to do is create and explore the world!

## **This modpack adds:**
- New armor, weapons and tools made from improved netherite, new ores from different dimensions.
- New landscape generation, new biomes, including in the nether and end.
- New structures and dungeons, with new loot.
- Optimization for weak computers and shaders for powerful ones.
- New mechanics, such as changing the way you entring the end and healing at the fire.
- New sounds and music disks.
- Boats, waystones and much more await you in this Modpack!
